requirements: R1: leads_to(tree, 'collect personal data', 'send email notification')
R2: executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service')
R3: executed_by(tree, 'send email notification', 'system')
R4: precedence(tree, 'determine loan risk level', 'check credit worthiness')
R5: precedence(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'check customer bank privilege')
R6: executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor')
R7: executed_by(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'post-processing clerk')
R8: executed_by(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'branch office manager')
R9: executed_by(tree, 'make final approval', 'branch office manager')
R10: executed_by(tree, 'make final rejection', 'branch office manager')
R11: condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'riskAcceptable == true', 'make final approval')
R12: condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'riskAcceptable == false', 'make final rejection')
R13: by_due_date(tree, 'sign loan contract', 604800, 'close offer')
R14: condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'loanRequestCredit > 1000000', 'check credit worthiness')
R15: executed_by(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'clerk supervisor')
R16: condition_directly_follows(tree, '(loanRequestCredit > 1000000) and (supervisorCheckPerformed == false)', 'create suspense file')
R17: failure_eventually_follows(tree, 'create suspense file', 'notify manager')
R18: executed_by(tree, 'notify manager', 'system')
R19: condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'customerStatus != "gold"', 'check customer bank privilege')
R20: data_leads_to_absence(tree, '(customerStatus == "gold") and (loanRequestAmount < 1000000)', 'determine loan risk level')
